default.heading: S-Tier Ranking
default.body: Predict the group's verdict and earn points when you match the consensus!

default.heading: Pick a Category
default.body: One random player chooses the category. Everyone else waits, because you could be next.

default.heading: Submit Your Entry
default.body: Everyone submits one item for the category. No duplicates allowed, so be creative.

default.heading: Tier Rank Everything
default.body: Place every entry into S, A, B, C, or D tier before the clock runs out.

default.heading: Consensus Wins!
default.body: The group decides the final tier for every item. Match them to score big.
